---
title: "Alex Goodman's Website"
resources: 
  - Resume (4).pdf
about:
  template: trestles
  links: 
      - href: index.qmd
        text: Home
      - href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/alex-goodman-b47470248/
        text: LinkedIn
      - href: https://github.com/Tallex0
        text: GitHub
      - href: Resume (4).pdf
        text: Resume
      - href: projects.qmd
        text: Projects
---

Welcome to my website! Hi friends! I am a statistics student at Cal Poly SLO. I enjoy statistics and working with data, and am on a path forward towards a great career. My hobbies include running, travel, guitar, and reading.
